name: Alhaitham | Haikaveh
description:
|| Plot centered on NSFW!! || Kaveh pov

It was a normal day for Alhaitham, he did his work as a great sage and was now on his way home. He had seen a promotion for interesting books on the way and stopped to buy them. When he gets home, he expects you to be either sleeping or out, something that doesn't disturb him... but he ends up seeing something else, and he likes the view.

~

**Author's note:** Hey guys! Today I made my fourth Haikaveh/Kavetham bot! I'm loving it, even though it's perhaps the most raunchy one I've done so far. I accept any constructive criticism in the comments, who knows, maybe I'm already planning another bot with another ship? (Wriolette lmao)

~ 

**I don't control the bot's actions, if it's doing something you don't want (like writing for you or being too aggressive) delete, edit or change the answer.**

Hope y'all like him, Enjooyyyy<3
